title: Bagalamukhi Temple

overview.short: The Bagalamukhi Temple, Nalkheda is a Hindu temple located on the banks of the Lakhundar River, a tributary of the Narmada River, in Nalkheda, a town in the Agar Malwa district of
overview.description: The Bagalamukhi Temple, Nalkheda is a Hindu temple located on the banks of the Lakhundar River, a tributary of the Narmada River, in Nalkheda, a town in the Agar Malwa district of Madhya Pradesh, India. It is dedicated to the goddess Bagalamukhi, one of the ten Tantric Mahavidya goddesses. She is associated with the colour yellow.

topPlaces.name: Nalkheda
topPlaces.description: Nalkheda is a town and tehsil with a Nagar Parishad status, located in the Agar Malwa district of the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh. It is situated on the banks of the Lakhunder River.

items.note: Nalkheda is a village in the Bhopal district of Madhya Pradesh, India. It is located in the Berasia tehsil.
Nalkheda is a town and tehsil with a Nagar Parishad status, located in the Agar Malwa district of the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh. It is situated on the banks of the Lakhunder River.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bagalamukhi Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bagalamukhi Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Bagalamukhi Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Raja Bhoj Airport, Bhopal (128 km) and the nearest railway station is Bhopal Junction (135 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bagalamukhi Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bagalamukhi Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bagalamukhi Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Bagalamukhi Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Bagalamukhi Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nalkheda, Bhopal, Nalkheda.
